title: HairLRM: Strand-based Hair Modeling via Large Reconstruction Models
figure: First strand-based hair modeling that integrates Large Reconstruction Models for improved accuracy.
abstract: HairLRM addresses the challenges of traditional strand-based hair modeling by incorporating Large Reconstruction Models to enhance the fidelity of hair geometry. The method utilizes a Dual Orientation AutoEncoder to refine coarse geometry into high-quality strands, effectively managing complex topological structures and setting a new standard in hair reconstruction accuracy.

title: Wispy to Voluminous: Prior-free Multi-view Capture of Strand-level Facial Hair
figure: First method to reconstruct high-fidelity facial hair strands from a 3D Gaussian representation.
abstract: This paper presents a novel pipeline for reconstructing facial hair from multi-view images, converting a 3D Gaussian representation into a strand-based model. The method addresses geometric ambiguities and preserves the unique characteristics of facial hair, making the strands suitable for various production tasks such as animation and rendering.

title: Real-Time Neural Hair Denoising
figure: First real-time method for strand-based hair G-Buffers reconstruction from undersampled inputs.
abstract: This paper presents a lightweight real-time method for reconstructing strand-based hair G-Buffers from undersampled rasterized inputs. It employs neural spatial reconstruction and tangent-guided steps to enhance hair visibility and shading quality across various hairstyles in both static and dynamic scenarios.

title: HairGPT: Strand-as-Language Autoregressive Modeling for Realistic 3D Hairstyle Synthesis
figure: First strand-centric framework for realistic 3D hairstyle synthesis via autoregressive modeling
abstract: HairGPT is a novel framework that models 3D hairstyle synthesis by treating hair strands as generative primitives. It employs a dual-decoupled autoregressive approach, allowing for structured and semantically controllable hair generation. The method supports compositional editing and adapts to various stylistic domains, enhancing the digital grooming workflow.
